FYI ГўВҖВ” December 2024
FYI ГўВ”ВҖ December 2024
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering Part
We updated various sections to include direction for other clients to contact their relationship manager for their fee schedule.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Interac
e-Transfer
ГӮВ®
Online Administration System (OAS) Part
Minor wording update to ensure users are aware FA user role is similar to CSR role and that only CSR roles can revoke email addresses.
PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў Direct Part
We updated minor language throughout the entire part and updated Chapter 9 to match current UI and terminology for LockГўВҖВҷnГўВҖВҷBlock / Lock Your Debit Card procedures.
